# Maintenance Marshall

> Multi-skilled property maintenance and technical services across Gauteng, South Africa. Services include ceilings, waterproofing, plumbing, electrical work, painting, roofing, geysers, drain unblocking, paving, welding, water systems, security automation and general property maintenance.

Maintenance Marshall (Pty) Ltd is a Kempton Park based maintenance company serving residential and commercial clients across Gauteng. The company provides accountable maintenance solutions for homes, offices, shops, body corporates, landlords, property managers and businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Property maintenance overview, service categories, company information and quote request form.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Search engine sitemap for crawl discovery.

## Main Service Areas

Kempton Park, Johannesburg, Pretoria, Centurion, Midrand, Sandton, Randburg, Roodepoort, Boksburg, Edenvale, Benoni and Germiston.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.maintenancemarshall.co.za
- Location: Kempton Park, Gauteng, South Africa
